provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content: These Regulations may be cited as the Land (Rent) Regulations.

provisions.title: Land Rent
provisions.content: The Land Rent payable for farms outside statutory township boundaries shall be as prescribed in the Schedule to these Regulations.

provisions.title: No refund
provisions.content: The land rent paid prior to the commencement of these Regulations shall not be refundable. Schedule The land rent for any type of farming outside any statutory township boundaries shall be Tanzania shillings two hundred only per acre or part thereof.
